home.heroEyebrow: Accredited by the Uzbek Accreditation Centre (O'ZAKK)
home.heroTitle: Your trusted partner in product certification and testing
home.heroText: SQA Group is a product certification body with accredited testing laboratories. We provide impartial conformity assessment against national and international standards.
home.certBodyCardText: Mandatory and voluntary product certification in accordance with O'z DSt ISO/IEC 17065:2015.
home.lab1CardText: Product testing in a laboratory accredited to O'z DSt ISO/IEC 17025:2019.
home.lab2CardText: Our second testing laboratory, accredited to O'z DSt ISO/IEC 17025:2019.
home.financingTeaser: Information about the body's sources of financing and guarantees of financial independence.
home.schemesTeaser: Certification schemes applied depending on the product type, and how they work.
home.accredCertTeaser: Product groups covered by the certification body's accreditation.
home.accredLabTeaser: Types and methods of testing our laboratories are accredited for.
home.applyText: Submit your certification application online through the official government portals.

about.title: About us
about.intro: Standart and Quality Assessment Group LLC is a conformity assessment company uniting a product certification body and testing laboratories.
about.p1: Our mission is impartial, competent and transparent assessment of product conformity with the requirements of the standards of the Republic of Uzbekistan and international standards.
about.p2: Our certification body is accredited by the Uzbek Accreditation Centre (O'ZAKK) to O'z DSt ISO/IEC 17065:2015, and our testing laboratory to O'z DSt ISO/IEC 17025:2019.
about.p3: We have deep knowledge and experience in conformity assessment, quality assurance and permitting procedures. By becoming our client, you gain access to the company's extensive capabilities.
about.p4: We are a driving force for innovation in this field of services, continuously developing new, more efficient and smarter services.
about.p5: SQA Group is your partner in making the best decisions and ensuring world-class quality.

certificationBody.title: Certification body
certificationBody.intro: The product certification body operates in accordance with O'z DSt ISO/IEC 17065:2015 and is accredited under certificate O'ZAKK.MS.0052.
certificationBody.scopeText: The body carries out mandatory and voluntary certification of product groups included in its accreditation scope: document review, sampling, organisation of testing, conformity assessment and certificate issuance.
certificationBody.impartialityText: Certification decisions are made independently of commercial, financial or other pressure. Threats to impartiality are regularly analysed and eliminated.

laboratories.title: Testing laboratories
laboratories.intro: Two testing units operate within the company. The laboratories are equipped with modern instruments and staffed by qualified specialists.
laboratories.lab1Text: Accredited to O'z DSt ISO/IEC 17025:2019 (certificate O'ZAKK.SL.0162). Performs tests and measurements for products included in the accreditation scope.
laboratories.lab2Text: Our second testing laboratory, accredited to O'z DSt ISO/IEC 17025:2019 (certificate O'ZAKK.SL.0437). Performs tests and measurements across additional product groups.
laboratories.eq4: Official test reports within short timeframes

team.title: Our team
team.subtitle: Our specialists
team.intro: Qualified specialists of the certification body and testing laboratories.
team.emptyState: Team members will appear here soon.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Latest updates
news.intro: Company activities, accreditation and industry news.

financing.title: Sources of financing
financing.intro: Information about the body's financial stability and independence.
financing.p1: The body's activities are financed by income from certification and testing services. Service fees are set by approved tariffs and applied equally to all clients.
financing.p2: The financing arrangement does not affect the impartiality of certification decisions: decisions are made independently of the financial relationship with the client.
financing.p3: The body is not financed from the state budget and does not depend on any manufacturer or trading organisation.

schemes.title: Certification schemes
schemes.intro: Schemes applied depending on the product type and form of supply.
schemes.p1: The certification scheme is selected based on product characteristics, production volume and supply conditions. The most commonly applied schemes are listed below.
schemes.scheme1Text: A specific batch of products is tested and a certificate is issued for that batch.
schemes.scheme2Text: A certificate for serial production is issued based on sample testing and production assessment, with periodic surveillance.
schemes.scheme3Text: For single or unique items, each item is tested individually.
schemes.noteText: Our specialists will advise you free of charge on the most suitable scheme — get in touch.

accreditation.certIntro: The certification body is accredited under certificate O'ZAKK.MS.0052. The accreditation scope is an integral part of the certificate.
accreditation.certText: The full list of product groups included in the accreditation scope is available in the annex to the official certificate — download the document or verify it at akkred.uz.
accreditation.labIntro: The testing laboratory is accredited under certificate O'ZAKK.SL.0162. The accreditation scope defines the types and methods of testing.
accreditation.labText: The list of test methods included in the laboratory's accreditation scope is provided in the annex to the official certificate. The document can be downloaded or verified at akkred.uz.
accreditation.verifyText: Accreditation status can be verified on the official website of the Uzbek Accreditation Centre:

appeals.title: Appeals & complaints
appeals.intro: How to file an appeal against certification body decisions, or submit complaints and suggestions.
appeals.p1: Every complaint or appeal is registered and reviewed by independent specialists who did not take part in the original decision.
appeals.p2: An official response is sent to the applicant in writing. The review process is based on the principles of confidentiality and impartiality.
appeals.templateText: Send your submission in the following format — it speeds up the review:
appeals.templateBody:
To: Standart and Quality Assessment Group LLC
From: [Full name / organisation]
Contact: [phone, email]
Subject: [Complaint / Appeal / Suggestion]

Details:
[Describe the situation in detail, including dates and reference numbers of relevant documents]

Attachments: [if any]
Date and signature

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.intro: If you have questions, contact us — our specialists will help.
